title: Bridge Essay: Within-subject reliability of brain networks during advanced meditation: An inte

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Formless absorption — meditative absorption, samadhi, jhana, trance states, transcendental meditation, non-ordinary states of consciousness.

**Within-subject reliability of brain networks during advanced meditation: An intensively sampled 7 Tesla MRI case study.** — Hum Brain Mapp. PMID: 38726831. DOI: 10.1002/hbm.26666. Advanced meditation such as jhana meditation can produce various altered states of consciousness (jhanas) and cultivate rewarding psychological qualities including joy, peace, compassion, and attentional stability. Mapping the neurobiological substrates of jhana meditation can inform the development and application of advanced meditation to enhance well-being.
